role_title: Senior Product Manager, Life Insurance & Financial Protection

level_signals: at least 4 years in a high-growth InsurTech or FinTech environment

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5 - 8 years in Product Management, with at least 4 years in a high-growth InsurTech or FinTech environment.
at least 4 years in a high-growth InsurTech or FinTech environment.
Expert-level ability to use data (SQL, Snowflake, Amplitude) to identify drop-off points in the funnel and build personalized member journeys. Leverage AI tooling for prototyping
Familiarity with FINRA, SEC, and State Insurance Department regulations. You know how to innovate while staying "inside the lines."
A "Get It Done" attitude. You are comfortable in a fast-paced environment where priorities can shift based on market opportunities.
Own the end-to-end "Quote-to-Purchase" Life Insurance journey and connect this benefit to the holistic SoFi "get your money right" mission.
Manage the technical and business relationships with our carrier partners, to ensure that our API integrations are robust, low-latency, and highly scalable.
Run a high-velocity testing roadmap. You'll test everything from "Life Milestones" UI components to different sequencing of application questions to drive the highest completion rate.
Mobile-First, AI-First Innovation: Optimize the experience for mobile devices and leveraging AI to make the experience easier for members

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska (due to insurance coverage issues)

scope.surface: SoFi Protect - Life Insurance product (Quote-to-Purchase journey, integration with lending and banking ecosystems)
scope.business_model: B2C financial services / insurance, mobile-first platform with 11M+ members
primary_metrics_inferred: Member adoption / awareness of life insurance product
core_responsibilities: Own the end-to-end 'Quote-to-Purchase' Life Insurance journey
Work with data scientists to streamline the application experience using third-party APIs
Run a high-velocity testing roadmap on UI components, application question sequencing, and completion rates
Manage technical and business relationships with carrier partners to ensure robust, low-latency, scalable API integrations
Build viral loops and referral mechanics for product-led growth
Optimize mobile-first and AI-first member experience including document collection and verification

green_flags: Clear product ownership area with well-defined surface (life insurance Quote-to-Purchase journey)
Specific tooling requirements named (SQL, Snowflake, Amplitude) indicating data-driven culture
Company has 11M+ members, suggesting meaningful scale for experimentation
Remote-eligible across most of the US
red_flags: Compensation range referenced ('listed below') but not actually included in the JD text — salary is unknown
Visa sponsorship not mentioned anywhere in the JD
4 years specifically in InsurTech or FinTech is a narrow qualifier that limits candidate pool
Remote work explicitly excluded for Hawaii and Alaska residents

scope.business_model (inferred from product description and member count)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from statement that final pay depends on candidate's location)
